content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory architectures can be augmented by tiering curiosity signals from ICM and RND to gate which new experiences are encoded into long-term episodic memory, rather than using fixed acquisition rules. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where high-curiosity, information-gap experiences are prioritized for long-term storage, improving the agent's ability to plan for novel out-of-distribution tasks.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
